prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `758abdf0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_758abdf0` as a new ARC2 package. The verifier applies a lane-local border rule: along each lane perpendicular to the all-zero border, a single adjacent `8` grows into a 2-cell `8` bar, while an existing 2-cell `8` bar disappears and becomes a 2-cell `0` bar on the opposite edge in the same lane. I used the `opus46` hint as a starting point and discarded the conflicting `sonnet45` interpretation in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_758abdf0/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 758abdf0` -> `3/3` official examples passed
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 758abdf0 --n-examples 1000` -> artifacts generated
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 758abdf0` -> `1000/1000` generated examples passed

The generator matches the task family by sampling only the observed ingredients: `7` background, one full `0` border on an edge, sparse lane-wise singles and 2-cell bars of `8` adjacent to that border, and the corresponding opposite-edge `0` bars in the outputs.
